description: T213 ConnectorRegistrationHandler MUST store only opaque connectorId in events — raw credentials MUST NOT appear in ConnectorRegistered or ConnectorRegistrationFailed payloads. ICredentialVaultService (F427) stores credentials as opaque references.

apiKey or secret present in any T213 emitted event

description: T213 ConnectorRegistrationHandler MUST call IRateLimitGuardService (F430) before the health probe external call. Probing before the rate check consumes external API quota that the rate guard would have blocked.

passConditions: T213 calls F430.checkRateLimit() at executionOrder=1 before health probe

description: T213 ConnectorRegistrationHandler MUST check for duplicate connectorId before registering. Re-registration of an existing connector must return idempotent success or ConnectorRegistrationFailed — never duplicate records in xiigen-connectors.

passConditions: T213 searches xiigen-connectors for existing connectorId before storing new record

description: T214 EtlSyncSagaHandler MUST follow EP-4 cycle order: rate_check (ORDER 1) → poll_page (ORDER 2) → land_raw (ORDER 3) → commit_cursor (ORDER 4). Any reorder causes data loss or quota waste.
resolution: T214 executes: F430.checkRateLimit() ORDER 1, pollPage() ORDER 2, storeDocument(raw) ORDER 3, cursorCheckpoint.commit() ORDER 4. Any reorder = BUILD_FAILURE.

T214 polls external source before rate limit check
EP-4 cycle order not rate_check→poll_page→land_raw→commit_cursor in T214

T214 calls storeDocument(rawRecord) at executionOrder=3 before cursor commit

description: T214 EtlSyncSagaHandler cursor MUST be validated monotonically increasing via ICursorCheckpointService (CF-193) at every commit. Non-monotonic cursor indicates duplicate ingestion and MUST be rejected. SyncJobFailed MUST include lastCursorPosition.
resolution: T214 uses ICursorCheckpointService.commitIfMonotonic(). Non-monotonic cursor = rejection + RecordQuarantined. SyncJobFailed includes lastCursorPosition.

SyncJobFailed event missing lastCursorPosition field
passConditions: T214 calls ICursorCheckpointService.commitIfMonotonic() for every cursor commit

description: T214, T215, T216 raw zone writes MUST be append-only (CF-192). No UPDATE or DELETE operations on xiigen-raw-records index. The raw zone is the immutable source of truth for all downstream transforms.
resolution: All raw zone writes use storeDocument() insert-only. Any updateDocument() or deleteDocument() on raw zone = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T215 WebhookIngestionHandler MUST use crypto.timingSafeEqual() for HMAC verification (CF-211). String === comparison leaks timing information enabling replay probing. Buffer.compare() or any non-constant-time comparison is also prohibited.
resolution: T215 uses crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(expected,'hex'), Buffer.from(actual,'hex')). String === or Buffer.compare() = BUILD_FAILURE.

T215 uses Buffer.compare() instead of timingSafeEqual for HMAC
crypto.timingSafeEqual absent from T215 HMAC verification path
passConditions: T215 calls crypto.timingSafeEqual() for HMAC signature comparison

No === string comparison or Buffer.compare() in T215 HMAC verification path

description: T215 WebhookIngestionHandler MUST return HTTP 200 with no event on invalid HMAC — never 401 or 403. Returning an error status gives attackers an oracle to enumerate valid signatures via response code difference.
resolution: T215 returns HTTP 200 { received: true } on HMAC failure with no WebhookEventIngested emitted. 401/403 on HMAC fail = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T216 BackfillCoordinator MUST scan for cursor discontinuities before dispatching slices. Dispatching slices without gap detection misses historical data voids that gap detection would have caught.

description: T216 BackfillCoordinator MUST honor the backfill blackout window from FREEDOM config key 'flow14_backfill_blackout_cron'. Running backfill during blackout windows causes load spikes at protected times. BackfillFailed MUST include failedSlice for targeted replay.

description: T219 DimensionalModelBuilder MUST use version-only SCD-2 (DR-62). Direct UPDATE on dimension records destroys historical audit trail. No updateDocument() calls allowed on xiigen-dimension-versions index.
resolution: T219 closes old version (effectiveTo) and opens new version (effectiveFrom) — never updateDocument(). Any updateDocument() on dimension records = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T219 DimensionalModelBuilder close_old_version + open_new_version MUST be atomic in a single transaction. Non-atomic pair creates orphaned dim records if the second operation fails after the first succeeds.
resolution: T219 uses atomicBatch([closeOld, openNew]). Separate transactions for close and open = BUILD_FAILURE per atomicDimVersioning contract.

description: T220 MartKpiBuilder MUST classify ALL fields via IPiiClassificationService (F462) BEFORE writing to mart zone (DR-63). If piiFieldsDetected > 0 without masking, the mart write is blocked. F462 cannot be skipped for 'numeric-only' fields.
resolution: T220 calls F462.classify() at ORDER 1 before any mart storeDocument(). PII detected without masking = DataProcessResult.failure. Any skip or post-write classification = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T220 MartKpiBuilder MUST emit PiiClassificationCompleted BEFORE MartRefreshed. MartRefreshed MUST include piiGateApplied: true. Emitting MartRefreshed first obscures the PII audit trail.
